title: Ramps
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling constructs and installs ramps of all types — modular aluminum and custom built-in solutions for home accessibility.
intro: Aging-In-Place Remodeling constructs and installs ramps of all types. We offer both aluminum modular ramps and custom built-in solutions to address residential accessibility challenges. As a major contractor for the San Diego VA, we possess expertise in selecting appropriate ramp types based on site conditions and individual mobility requirements.
keyInfo: The general rule of thumb for ramp layout is that there needs to be one foot of ramp for every inch of rise.

subServices.name: Threshold & Portable Ramps
subServices.description: Multiple ramping solutions for minor elevation changes. We are an authorized dealer for various threshold ramp brands.

subServices.name: Modular Ramps
subServices.description: The EZ-ACCESS Modular Ramp system is an excellent choice when accessibility needs extend beyond the scope of a portable ramp. Aluminum construction, installable and removable with minimal landscape impact. Best for short-term needs under 2 years.

subServices.name: Custom Ramps
subServices.description: For the ultimate in accessibility and aesthetics, a built-in-place ramp is the best option. More labor-intensive but better appearance and potential to add home value.
